content.cn_text: 现在翻到第二部分。
content.en_text: Now turn to Section 2.

content.cn_text: 第二部分。
content.en_text: Section 2.

content.cn_text: 你将听到一个关于参加合唱团唱歌的广播节目。
content.en_text: You will hear a radio program about singing in a choir.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间查看第11至15题。
content.en_text: First, you have some time to look at questions 11 to 15.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听，并回答第11至15题。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully and answer questions 11 to 15.

content.cn_text: 接下来是我们关于城里活动的固定栏目，有请记者 Samuel Cooper。
content.en_text: And for our regular spot on things to do in town, here's our reporter Samuel Cooper.

content.cn_text: 这次写关于加入本地合唱团的内容很有趣。
content.en_text: It's been fun to write about joining some of our local choirs.

content.cn_text: 谢谢。
content.en_text: Thank you.

content.cn_text: 嗯，由于有点担心自己唱准音的能力，
content.en_text: Well, feeling a bit apprehensive about my ability to sing in tune,

content.cn_text: 我最近去了镇上三个最大的合唱团参加排练。
content.en_text: I recently headed off for rehearsals at the town's three biggest choirs.

content.cn_text: 它们分别是 Mitchelstown Choir、Blackvale Male Voice Choir 和 Caroline Singers。
content.en_text: Mitchelstown Choir, the Blackvale Male Voice Choir, and the Caroline Singers.

content.cn_text: 我在三个合唱团都受到了非常热情的欢迎。
content.en_text: I received a very warm welcome at all three choirs.

content.cn_text: 它们一直在寻找新的、热情的歌手。
content.en_text: They are always on the lookout for new and enthusiastic singers.

content.cn_text: 显然，决定加入哪个合唱团，在某种程度上取决于你的音乐品味。
content.en_text: Now, obviously deciding which choir to join will depend to some extent on your taste in music.

content.cn_text: Blackvale 能满足大多数音乐品味，因为它的曲目非常多样，Mitchelstown 也是如此。
content.en_text: Blackvale caters for most musical taste as it has a hugely varied repertoire as does Mitchelstown.

content.cn_text: 如果你追求更古典的感觉，Caroline Singers 通常专注于牧歌。
content.en_text: If you're after a more classical feel, the Caroline Singers tend to focus on madrigals.

content.cn_text: 也就是没有任何乐器伴奏的无伴奏演唱。
content.en_text: That's unaccompanied singing without any instruments.

content.cn_text: 如果你想认识同样对音乐感兴趣的人，
content.en_text: If you want to meet people who share an interest in music,

content.cn_text: Mitchelstown Choir 是一个很好的起点。
content.en_text: Mitchelstown Choir is a good place to start.

content.cn_text: 除了他们自己的演出之外，
content.en_text: Apart from their own performances,

content.cn_text: 他们还会组织集体出行去看歌剧和参加音乐节。
content.en_text: they also arrange group visits to see operas and attend music festivals.

content.cn_text: 所以这可以是交朋友的好方式。
content.en_text: So it can be a great way to make friends.

content.cn_text: 但这不仅仅是一个发展技能的机会，
content.en_text: But it's not just a chance to develop a skill,

content.cn_text: 也不仅仅是旅行或交朋友的机会。
content.en_text: travel or make friends that's on offer.

content.cn_text: 你还可能赢得金牌。
content.en_text: You could win a gold medal too.

content.cn_text: Mitchelstown 希望进入亚特兰大 Melody 比赛的决赛。
content.en_text: Mitchelstown are hoping to get to the final at the Melody competition in Atlanta.

content.cn_text: 而Blackvale 是目前 Counter-Male Voice Choir Award 的获奖者，
content.en_text: And Blackvale are the current holders of the Counter-Male Voice Choir Award,

content.cn_text: 这个奖项是上个月由伦敦歌剧院院长颁给他们的。
content.en_text: which was presented to them by the director of the London Opera just last month.

content.cn_text: 你也可以参与录音项目。
content.en_text: You can also be a part of a recording deal.

content.cn_text: Mitchelstown 刚刚加入 Blackvale 和 Caroline Singers 的行列，成为录音艺人，
content.en_text: Mitchelstown has just joined Blackvale and Caroline Singers as recording artists

content.cn_text: 他们的第一张 CD 将于12月在商店发售。
content.en_text: for their first CD, due in shops in December.

content.cn_text: 如果这些还不够，
content.en_text: And if all of that isn't enough,

content.cn_text: 你还可以通过为公益事业筹款来造福当地社区。
content.en_text: you can also benefit the local community by helping to raise funds for good causes.

content.cn_text: Mitchelstown 经常在帮助残障人士和老人的活动中演出。
content.en_text: Mitchelstown regularly performs at functions helping the disabled and the elderly.

content.cn_text: 而 Blackvale 会把一部分利润捐给某些当地慈善机构。
content.en_text: While Blackvale donates a percentage of its profits to certain local charities.

content.cn_text: 在你听剩余节目之前，
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the program,

content.cn_text: 你有一些时间查看第16至20题。
content.en_text: you have some time to look at questions 16 to 20.

content.cn_text: 现在请听，并回答第16至20题。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 16 to 20.

content.cn_text: 你可能觉得自己无法加入合唱团，因为你担心很难找到时间
content.en_text: You may feel unable to join a choir because you're worried you'd struggle to find the time

content.cn_text: 参加排练，因为你有工作或家庭方面的责任。
content.en_text: to attend rehearsals because of work or family commitments.

content.cn_text: 嗯，这个问题有一个解决办法。
content.en_text: Well, there is a solution to that.

content.cn_text: 在工作场所创办自己的合唱团。
content.en_text: Start your own choir at work.

content.cn_text: 大大小小的公司都已经这样做过，
content.en_text: This has been done in companies large and small,

content.cn_text: 我去了解了会计公司 John White 的合唱团。
content.en_text: and I went to find out about the one at the accountants John White.

content.cn_text: 合唱团组织者 Elizabeth Arnold 告诉我，她认为人们喜欢这个合唱团的原因。
content.en_text: The choir's organizer, Elizabeth Arnold, told me the reason she thinks people like the choir.

content.cn_text: 她说，虽然有些人心里可能会想到大型社交拓展机会，
content.en_text: She said that while the thought of big networking opportunities might be at the back of some people's mind,

content.cn_text: 但他们真正想要的是有机会暂时放松，专注于完全不同的事情。
content.en_text: it's having the opportunity to switch off and focus on something completely different that they're after.

content.cn_text: 加入的人往往一开始就是相当有能力的歌手，
content.en_text: The people that join tend to be fairly competent singers to start with,

content.cn_text: 因为很自然，人们不想在同事面前表现得不好。
content.en_text: because naturally enough, people don't want to look bad in front of their colleagues.

content.cn_text: 像 John White 这样的公司鼓励员工在工作场所建立合唱团，
content.en_text: Companies like John White encourage their employees to set up choirs at work

content.cn_text: 因为这有助于营造更健康的工作氛围。
content.en_text: because it can help to create a healthier working atmosphere.

content.cn_text: 例如，以前相处不好的人可能会发现他们有共同点，
content.en_text: For example, people who previously didn't get on can find they have something in common,

content.cn_text: 这其实很符合常理。
content.en_text: which is just common sense, really.

content.cn_text: Elizabeth Arnold 还强调，要让合唱团起步并不需要很多人。
content.en_text: Elizabeth Arnold also stresses that you don't need a lot of people to get the choir off the ground.

content.cn_text: 他们四年前开始时只有5个人。
content.en_text: They started off four years ago with just five people.

content.cn_text: 现在人数已经增加到19人，而他们每次排练的平均出席人数是12。
content.en_text: That's now risen to 19 while their average attendance at rehearsals is 12.

content.cn_text: 许多人没有时间在工作之外参加排练，
content.en_text: Many people don't have time to go to rehearsals outside work,

content.cn_text: 但他们会在工作期间找到时间参加。
content.en_text: however, they find the time to go to them while they're at work.

content.cn_text: 在 John White，他们发现一天中午最合适，因为并不是每个人工作时间都一样。
content.en_text: At John White, they found the middle of the day works best because not everyone works the same hours.

content.cn_text: 所以安排清晨排练可能会有问题。
content.en_text: So scheduling early morning rehearsals can be problematic.

content.cn_text: 下午晚些时候也是如此。
content.en_text: The same is true for late afternoon.

content.cn_text: John White 非常乐意支持他们的合唱团。
content.en_text: Supporting their choir is something that John White are very happy to do.

content.cn_text: 虽然成员需要支付入会费，用来支付聚会茶点的费用，
content.en_text: Although members pay a joining fee to cover the cost of refreshments at parties

content.cn_text: 并且穿专门的演出衬衫，但公司会定期组织课程，
content.en_text: and wear special concert shirts, the company organizes regular sessions

content.cn_text: 由专业声乐教练授课，并且对合唱团成员免费。
content.en_text: with a professional vocal coach free of charge to members of the choir.

content.cn_text: 如果你想了解更多关于这些合唱团的信息，第二部分到此结束。
content.en_text: So if you'd like more information about the choirs, that is the end of section two.

content.cn_text: 现在你有半分钟时间检查答案。
content.en_text: You now have half a minute to check your answers.

groups.desc: Choose the correct letter from the box, A, B or C, next to questions 11–15.
groups.title: Questions 11–15

items.title: They specialise in a particular type of music
items.analysis: 答案解析：第11题问哪个合唱团专门演唱某一类音乐，原文说 Caroline Singers focus on madrigals，因此答案是 C。

items.title: They organise social events
items.analysis: 答案解析：第12题问哪个合唱团组织社交活动，原文说 Mitchelstown arrange group visits，因此答案是 A。

items.title: They have recently won a competition
items.analysis: 答案解析：第13题问哪个合唱团最近赢得比赛，原文说 Blackvale are the current holders，且 last month 颁奖，因此答案是 B。

items.title: They have recently recorded their first CD
items.analysis: 答案解析：第14题问哪个合唱团最近录制了第一张 CD，原文说 Mitchelstown... their first CD，因此答案是 A。

items.title: They participate in charity events
items.analysis: 答案解析：第15题问哪个合唱团参加慈善活动，原文说 Mitchelstown performs at functions helping the disabled and the elderly，因此答案是 A。

groups.desc: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C
groups.title: Questions 16–20

items.title: Elizabeth Arnold thinks people join a choir at work because it gives them a chance to
items.analysis: 答案解析：第16题问 Elizabeth Arnold 认为人们为什么加入工作合唱团，原文说 switch off and focus on something different，对应 A “have a break from work”。

items.title: How does a company benefit from setting up a choir?

options.title: B
options.content: less sick leave taken by employees

items.analysis: 答案解析：第17题问公司设立合唱团有什么好处，原文说能让原本相处不好的人发现共同点，对应 A “improved relationships between co-workers”。

items.title: How many members does the John White choir have?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第18题问 John White 合唱团有多少成员，原文说 now risen to 19，因此答案是 C。

items.title: When do the choir have their rehearsals?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第19题问合唱团什么时候排练，原文说 middle of the day works best，对应 B “at lunch-time”。

items.title: How does the company support the choir?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第20题问公司如何支持合唱团，原文说 professional vocal coach free of charge，对应 C “by paying for singing classes”。
